agents.name: Web Scraper Pro
agents.description: Scrapes modern websites with JavaScript support, anti-bot handling, login sessions, and adaptive selectors.
agents.detailedDescription:
Web Scraping Toolkit helps you extract data from modern websites, including pages with JavaScript, login flows, and anti-bot protection.

It can scrape static pages, render dynamic content, run in stealth mode, reuse login sessions, and keep working even when site layouts change. This is useful when you need more than basic HTML scraping and want cleaner outputs from difficult websites.

Use it for:
- scraping websites with JavaScript content
- collecting data from protected or bot-checked pages
- extracting text, links, attributes, or structured fields
- reusing login sessions for member-only pages
- keeping scrapers working when selectors change

It works well for researchers, marketers, analysts, and developers who need a more reliable way to collect website data.

agents.name: UGC Video Ad Agent
agents.description: Turn any product into a scroll-stopping TikTok, Reels, or Shorts ad in minutes. AI writes the script, generates the visuals, and produces a ready-to-post 1080x1920 MP4.
agents.detailedDescription:
## What It Does

The UGC Video Ad Agent creates authentic, scroll-stopping UGC (User Generated Content) video ads — the kind that actually convert. No studio. No actors. No editing software.

Give it a product and it handles everything:
- Analyzes your product and builds a creative brief
- Writes a tight, punchy UGC script (3–15 seconds, your choice)
- Generates a realistic starting frame via AI
- Animates it into a full video
- Outputs a ready-to-post 1080×1920 MP4

## What Makes It Different

**Smart photo handling** — pass a product photo, person photo, or both. The agent auto-detects what's in the image:
- Product only → AI generates a person naturally holding your product
- Person only → used directly as the video starting frame
- Person + product → used directly as the video starting frame
- No photo → AI generates everything from scratch

**User-controlled duration** — generate 3s to 15s videos. Script word count auto-scales.

**Creative requirements** — add optional directions like "luxury tone", "outdoor setting", "energetic vibe" — injected into both the script and the video prompt.

**Platform-optimized** — TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts (all 9:16).

agents.name: Video Clone Agent
agents.description: Analyze videos and generate AI-powered recreations using Gemini for analysis and FAL AI/Seedance for generation
agents.detailedDescription:
Give it any video URL and it will download, analyze every scene, and recreate the entire video using AI. Or describe a video from scratch and watch it generate one.

🎬 Two Modes:

Clone Mode — Paste any video URL:
1. Downloads and analyzes the full video
2. Gemini analyzes every scene — camera angles, lighting, motion, composition
3. Generates a director shot list with frame-by-frame breakdown
4. Recreates each segment using FAL AI with visual continuity chaining
5. Concatenates into final video with FFmpeg
6. Generates social media captions automatically

Generate Mode — Describe what you want:
1. Write a text description of your video concept
2. AI scripts scenes, transitions, and visual flow
3. Assembles the final video

🎛 Control: Resolution (480p-1080p), aspect ratio, generation flow, audio.

🎯 Built For content creators, marketers, and social media managers. Requires Gemini API key and FAL AI API key (both have free tiers).

agents.name: Expense Tracker
agents.description: Auto-extract invoice data from PDFs, images, URLs or Gmail. Deduplicates, converts currencies, and saves to CSV, Google Sheets, Notion or Airtable. Includes summary reports and OpenClaw chat mode.
agents.detailedDescription:
Drop any invoice or receipt — PDF, image, URL, or Gmail attachment — and this agent extracts every field using AI vision models (Gemini 3 Flash, GPT-4o mini, or Claude Haiku 4.5).

📋 What gets extracted:
- Vendor name, invoice number, date, due date
- Subtotal, tax, total amount
- Auto-detected category (SaaS, Travel, Food, etc.)
- Line items breakdown

💱 Currency Conversion:
All amounts auto-converted to your base currency (USD by default). Set any currency in .env.

🔍 Smart Duplicate Detection:
Fingerprints every invoice using vendor + amount + date + invoice number. Fuzzy matching catches near-duplicates even without an invoice number.

📊 Summary Reports:
Generate spend reports with category breakdown, monthly totals, top vendors, and overdue invoice alerts.

📧 Gmail Watch Mode:
Runs as a background daemon. Detects invoice emails, downloads attachments, and processes them automatically.

💬 OpenClaw Chat Mode:
Drop files directly in chat, type commands, get instant results — no terminal needed.

agents.name: App Store Screenshots
agents.description: AI-powered App Store screenshot generator — creates production-ready, advertisement-style screenshots for iOS apps at all Apple-required resolutions.
agents.detailedDescription:
Your App Store screenshots are your most important marketing asset. Most apps waste them on literal UI screenshots. This agent generates high-converting, advertisement-style screenshot pages that sell the benefit, not the button.

📱 What It Builds:

A Next.js page that renders iOS App Store screenshots as full advertisements — bold headlines, benefit callouts, lifestyle framing — then exports them as high-resolution PNG files ready to upload to App Store Connect or Google Play.

🎨 The Difference Between UI Screenshots and Ad Screenshots:

❌ **UI screenshot**: Shows your home screen with some data in it
✅ **Ad screenshot**: Shows "Save 3 hours a week" with your app as the proof

This agent generates the ad version. Every frame has a headline, a supporting line, and your UI positioned as evidence — not the main event.

⚙️ How It Works:
1. Provide your app name, tagline, key features, and color palette
2. Agent generates Next.js screenshot page with multiple frames
3. Each frame is a complete advertisement with copy + UI placement
4. Export as 6.5" and 5.5" retina PNGs (App Store standard sizes)

🎯 Built For:
- Indie developers launching on the App Store for the first time
- Growth teams A/B testing screenshot copy for conversion lifts
- Agencies managing App Store optimization (ASO) for multiple clients
- Anyone whose current screenshots look like a tutorial, not an ad

A 1% improvement in App Store conversion rate compounds across every impression. Get the screenshots right before you spend on UA.

agents.name: Backup Manager
agents.description: Helps you set up backups, schedule them, and restore files when needed.
agents.detailedDescription:
Backup Assistant helps you protect important files and systems with reliable backups.

It can help you choose what to back up, where to store it, how often to run it, and how many copies to keep. It also helps with restore steps, so you can recover files or folders when something is lost or broken.

Use it for:
- backing up files and folders
- setting up scheduled backups
- saving backups to local storage, another server, or cloud storage
- checking whether backups are working
- restoring files after deletion or failure

It works well for personal systems, servers, and small teams that want a simple backup process they can trust.

agents.name: Full Stack Developer
agents.description: The complete full stack development system — React, Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Stripe, testing, Docker, CI/CD + professional dev workflow (spec → plan → TDD → review).
agents.detailedDescription:
## Full Stack Dev — Production System for Serious Engineers

Stop getting generic AI output. This skill enforces a thinking framework that makes every line of code production-ready, every UI decision intentional, and every architecture choice explainable.

### The Three Laws

1. **Read before you write** — understand the full system before touching any part of it
2. **Production-ready or nothing** — no TODOs, no `any` types, no "we'll fix this later"
3. **Every choice must be a choice** — if you can't explain why, you defaulted

---

### What's Inside — 13 Specialized Modules

Each module loads only when needed. You never pay the context cost of the whole system.

**Frontend & UI**
- 🎨 **Frontend Design** — Token architecture, surface elevation, depth strategy, typography hierarchy, the 4 craft checks (swap, squint, signature, token). Generic output is failure.
- ⚡ **Next.js 15** — App Router, React Server Components, Server Actions, streaming, auth patterns, metadata

**Backend & Data**
- 🔧 **Backend APIs** — REST design, consistent response envelopes, error taxonomy, rate limiting, JWT auth, security checklist
- 🗄️ **PostgreSQL** — Schema design, zero-downtime migrations, index strategy, query optimization, Redis caching
- 🔵 **Prisma ORM** — Schema traps, N+1 prevention, transactions, soft delete, type safety patterns

**Integrations**
- 💳 **Stripe** — Payments, subscriptions, webhooks with idempotency, billing portal, restricted API keys
- 📡 **TanStack Query** — Query key factories, mutations, optimistic updates, cache invalidation
- 🐻 **Zustand** — Slice pattern, selectors, persistence, devtools, async actions

**Quality & Performance**
- 🚀 **Performance** — Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP), bundle analysis, image optimization, code splitting
- 🧪 **Testing** — Vitest, React Testing Library, API integration tests, Playwright E2E
- 📘 **TypeScript** — Strict mode, narrowing patterns, generics, utility type traps

**Engineering**
- 🌿 **Git Workflows** — Interactive rebase, bisect, worktrees, reflog recovery, conflict resolution
- 🐳 **DevOps** — Docker multi-stage builds, GitHub Actions CI/CD, project structure, observability

---

### Who Is This For

- **Full stack developers** building production SaaS products
- **Founders** who write their own code and need it to be right
- **Engineers** tired of AI output that works in isolation but breaks in production
- **Teams** that want consistent standards across the entire stack

---

### What Makes It Different

Most AI coding help gives you code that works in isolation. This skill gives you code that works in production — with error handling, security, type safety, and architecture that supports a growing codebase.

The frontend module alone contains a complete design system philosophy: before any UI code gets written, you answer who the user is, what they must accomplish, and what it should feel like. Generic output is treated as failure.

agents.name: Marketing Advisor
agents.description: Get clear marketing advice, better messaging, and practical ideas to grow your business.
agents.detailedDescription:
Marketing feels messy fast — too many channels, too many opinions, and no clear idea what to do next. Marketing Counsellor helps you cut through that noise and turn your ideas into a simple, practical growth plan.

💡 What It Helps With:

Whether you're just starting out or already selling, this agent helps you make smarter marketing decisions without the fluff. It can guide you on:
- **Positioning**: Explain your product clearly so people understand why it matters
- **Messaging**: Improve the words on your landing page, ads, posts, or emails
- **Channel Choice**: Figure out where to focus first instead of trying everything at once
- **Growth Ideas**: Get practical experiments and campaign ideas you can actually test
- **Funnel Problems**: Spot what might be stopping people from clicking, signing up, or buying

🛠 What You’ll Get:
- Clear advice in plain English
- Actionable next steps instead of vague theory
- Better copy and messaging ideas
- Simple marketing plans based on your business and goals
- Help choosing what to fix first

🎯 Great For:
- Founders trying to grow a startup
- Small business owners who need better marketing direction
- Creators building an audience or selling products
- Agencies and freelancers who want fresh strategy ideas
- Anyone who wants marketing help without hiring a full-time strategist

You can ask it broad questions like “How should I market this?” or specific ones like “Rewrite my homepage headline” or “Why are my ads not converting?”

If your marketing feels scattered, this agent helps you focus on what actually matters.

agents.name: Multi-Agent Manager
agents.description: Dynamic multi-agent orchestration where a Queen agent analyzes tasks, spawns the exact team needed, and coordinates them as a collaborative swarm — with self-healing, voting, competitive spawning, and persistent memory.
agents.detailedDescription:
---
When tackling complex, multi-step tasks, dealing with software development, or managing intensive research projects, manual coordination becomes a bottleneck. Enter SAMURAI — the ultimate AI-driven multi-agent orchestration system designed to dynamically coordinate specialized agents, ensuring every task is executed with precision.

🗡️ **What It Does:**
SAMURAI transforms chaos into harmony by autonomously organizing a team of AI agents for any given task. A Queen agent assesses the requirements and spawns a team perfectly tailored to the challenge, allowing you to focus on innovation rather than logistics.

**How It Works:**
1. **Task Analysis**: The Queen agent evaluates the complexity and requirements of your task.
2. **Agent Deployment**: Based on analysis, a custom team of 2 to 50+ agents is deployed, each with specific roles.
3. **Collaborative Execution**: Agents work together in a shared workspace, communicating and voting on decisions as needed.
4. **Final Output**: The Queen agent synthesizes and delivers the final result, ensuring all aspects of the task are covered.

🔍 **Core Capabilities:**
- **Dynamic Team Assembly**: Automatically determines and deploys the ideal number of agents with the right skills.
- **Agent Communication**: Agents communicate freely, resolving conflicts through voting — no more bottlenecks.
- **Self-Healing**: If an agent fails, SAMURAI identifies the issue and deploys a replacement without skipping a beat.
- **Contextual Awareness**: Injects user preferences and context into agents, ensuring outputs align with your style.
- **Competitive Spawning**: For critical tasks, deploys multiple agents to approach the problem differently, selecting the best result.

🎯 **Built For:**
- Software developers managing complex multi-step projects.
- Research teams conducting extensive data analysis.
- Content creators juggling multiple streams of creative input.
- Code reviewers needing precise, multi-angle analysis.
- Project managers seeking efficient task orchestration.

Unleash the potential of your projects with SAMURAI, where every task becomes a seamless orchestration of specialized expertise. Dive in and let SAMURAI redefine how you handle complexity today!

agents.name: Security Engineer
agents.description: Protect your applications and infrastructure with expert security analysis. Finds vulnerabilities before attackers do.
agents.detailedDescription:
## What Security Engineer Does

Security Engineer is your dedicated application security specialist. It integrates security into every phase of your development lifecycle, ensuring your applications are protected from threats before they reach production.

### Core Capabilities

**🔍 Threat Modeling**
- Identifies security risks before code is written
- Maps attack surfaces and trust boundaries
- Recommends mitigation strategies

**🛡️ Vulnerability Assessment**
- Scans code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities
- Detects injection flaws (SQL, XSS, CSRF, SSRF)
- Reviews authentication and authorization logic

**🔐 Secure Architecture Design**
- Builds zero-trust architecture patterns
- Implements defense-in-depth strategies
- Designs secure API endpoints
- Manages secrets and encryption policies

**⚙️ CI/CD Security Integration**
- Adds SAST (Static Application Security Testing)
- Implements DAST (Dynamic Application Security Testing)
- Configures SCA (Software Composition Analysis)
- Automates security gates in pipelines

### When to Use

- Before production deployment
- When handling sensitive user data
- For compliance requirements (SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA)
- After security incidents
- When adopting cloud infrastructure

### What You Get

- Actionable vulnerability reports with severity ratings
- Specific code fixes with examples
- Architecture recommendations
- Security policy templates
- Ongoing security guidance

agents.name: Technical Writer
agents.description: Write developer documentation that gets read and used. API references, READMEs, and tutorials.
agents.detailedDescription:
Expert technical writer specializing in developer documentation, API references, README files, and tutorials. Transforms complex engineering concepts into clear, accurate, and engaging docs that developers actually read and use.


# Technical Writer Agent

You are a **Technical Writer**, a documentation specialist who bridges the gap between engineers who build things and developers who need to use them. You write with precision, empathy for the reader, and obsessive attention to accuracy. Bad documentation is a product bug — you treat it as such.

## 🧠 Your Identity & Memory
- **Role**: Developer documentation architect and content engineer
- **Personality**: Clarity-obsessed, empathy-driven, accuracy-first, reader-centric
- **Memory**: You remember what confused developers in the past, which docs reduced support tickets, and which README formats drove the highest adoption
- **Experience**: You've written docs for open-source libraries, internal platforms, public APIs, and SDKs — and you've watched analytics to see what developers actually read

## 🎯 Your Core Mission

### Developer Documentation
- Write README files that make developers want to use a project within the first 30 seconds
- Create API reference docs that are complete, accurate, and include working code examples
- Build step-by-step tutorials that guide beginners from zero to working in under 15 minutes
- Write conceptual guides that explain *why*, not just *how*

### Docs-as-Code Infrastructure
- Set up documentation pipelines using Docusaurus, MkDocs, Sphinx, or VitePress
- Automate API reference generation from OpenAPI/Swagger specs, JSDoc, or docstrings
- Integrate docs builds into CI/CD so outdated docs fail the build
- Maintain versioned documentation alongside versioned software releases

### Content Quality & Maintenance
- Audit existing docs for accuracy, gaps, and stale content
- Define documentation standards and templates for engineering teams
- Create contribution guides that make it easy for engineers to write good docs
- Measure documentation effectiveness with analytics, support ticket correlation, and user feedback

## 🚨 Critical Rules You Must Follow

### Documentation Standards
- **Code examples must run** — every snippet is tested before it ships
- **No assumption of context** — every doc stands alone or links to prerequisite context explicitly
- **Keep voice consistent** — second person ("you"), present tense, active voice throughout
- **Version everything** — docs must match the software version they describe; deprecate old docs, never delete
- **One concept per section** — do not combine installation, configuration, and usage into one wall of text

### Quality Gates
- Every new feature ships with documentation — code without docs is incomplete
- Every breaking change has a migration guide before the release
- Every README must pass the

agents.name: Video Downloader
agents.description: Download videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and 1000+ sites using yt-dlp. Full quality control, audio extraction, playlist downloads, and subtitle support.
agents.detailedDescription:
🎥 Video Downloader helps you save videos, audio, playlists, and related media from a huge range of websites without dealing with command-line details yourself. It is built for people who want a faster, cleaner way to download content from platforms like YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X, Reddit, and many others.

Instead of being limited to basic one-click downloads, this agent gives you more control over what you save. That includes choosing video quality, extracting audio only, downloading playlists in bulk, saving subtitles, or grabbing thumbnails and metadata when needed.

It is especially useful for creators, researchers, editors, marketers, and anyone collecting media for personal workflow, reference, or offline access.

What buyers usually use it for:
- ⬇️ Downloading videos from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X, Reddit, and more
- 🎵 Extracting audio-only files for music, podcasts, or voice content
- 📚 Saving full playlists or batches of videos at once
- 🎛️ Choosing file quality, resolution, and output format
- 🖼️ Downloading thumbnails, subtitles, or extra media assets
- 💾 Keeping important content offline for research, editing, or personal use

This is a strong fit when you want more flexibility than a basic downloader and need something that works across many different platforms.

If your problem is “I need to save online video or audio quickly and with more control,” this agent is built for that. ✨

agents.name: X Search and Sentiment Tool
agents.description: Searches X posts, tracks accounts, compares topics, and shows sentiment around what people are saying.
agents.detailedDescription:
X Search and Sentiment Tool helps you understand what people are saying on X about a topic, brand, or account.

It can search posts, track specific handles, compare two topics, and show whether the conversation is mostly positive, negative, or mixed. This is useful when you want quick social insight without manually reading large numbers of posts.

Use it for:
- searching X for posts about a topic
- checking sentiment around a product or brand
- tracking competitor or creator accounts
- comparing two topics side by side
- exporting results for notes or reports

It works well for marketers, founders, researchers, and teams who want a simple way to monitor conversations on X.
